question: List the state name, the district name, and the ULB/RLB village name, grouped by state, district, and village name, and ordered alphabetically by the village name.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME;
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
FROM DIM_STATE ds
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON ds.STATE_ID = dd.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_LOCATION dl ON dd.DISTRICT_ID = dl.DISTRICT_ID
GROUP BY ds.STATE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
ORDER BY dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.STATE_NAME,
    dd.DISTRICT_NAME,
    dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
FROM DIM_STATE ds
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON ds.STATE_ID = dd.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_LOCATION dl ON dd.DISTRICT_ID = dl.DISTRICT_ID
GROUP BY ds.STATE_NAME, dd.DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
ORDER BY dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC;

question: జిల్లా పేరు, రాష్ట్ర పేరు మరియు దేశ పేరును జిల్లా పేరు ఆధారంగా వర్ణమాల క్రమంలో జాబితా చేయండి.

question: రాష్ట్రాల పేర్లు మరియు ప్రతి రాష్ట్రానికి జిల్లా ఐడీల మొత్తం సంఖ్యను జాబితా చేయండి, జిల్లాల సంఖ్య ఆధారంగా అవరోహణ క్రమంలో అమర్చి, కేవలం మొదటి 5 ఫలితాలను మాత్రమే చూపించండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.STATE_NAME, COUNT(dd.DISTRICT_ID) AS district_count
FROM DIM_STATE ds
LEFT JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON ds.STATE_ID = dd.STATE_ID
GROUP BY ds.STATE_ID, ds.STATE_NAME
ORDER BY district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT ds.STATE_NAME, COUNT(dd.DISTRICT_ID) AS district_count
FROM DIM_STATE ds
LEFT JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd ON ds.STATE_ID = dd.STATE_ID
GROUP BY ds.STATE_ID, ds.STATE_NAME
ORDER BY district_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: ప్రతి రాష్ట్రం పేరు మరియు దానికి సంబంధించిన స్థాన IDల సంఖ్యను, రాష్ట్రం పేరు ఆధారంగా సమూహపరచి, అత్యధిక నుండి అత్యల్ప సంఖ్య వరకు క్రమబద్ధీకరించి జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name,
    COUNT(dl.location_id) AS location_count
FROM 
    dim_state ds
    LEFT JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
    LEFT JOIN dim_location dl ON dd.district_id = dl.district_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name
ORDER BY 
    location_count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.state_name,
    COUNT(dl.location_id) AS location_count
FROM 
    dim_state ds
    LEFT JOIN dim_district dd ON ds.state_id = dd.state_id
    LEFT JOIN dim_location dl ON dd.district_id = dl.district_id
GROUP BY 
    ds.state_name
ORDER BY 
    location_count DESC;

    SELECT dl2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
    FROM DIM_LOCATION dl2
    JOIN DIM_DISTRICT dd2 ON dl2.DISTRICT_ID = dd2.DISTRICT_ID
    WHERE dd2.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Prakasam'
)
GROUP BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, dl.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
ORDER BY dl.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC;
raw_output:

    WHERE dd2.DISTRICT_NAME ILIKE 'Prakasam'
